title: Feature: Timestamp-based ADR numbering (YYMMDDHHMM) to prevent ID collisions

steps.description: Fix existing collision: rename ADR-059-embedded-asset-bundle.md to ADR-2603171200-embedded-asset-bundle.md (using its original creation date). Update all internal references to ADR-059 that point to the embedded asset bundle ADR.
steps.done_condition: No duplicate ADR numbers exist; both former ADR-059 files have unique IDs; all cross-references updated

steps.description: Update Rust CLI ADR ID generation: replace find_next_adr_number() in hex-cli/src/commands/adr.rs to generate YYMMDDHHMM from chrono::Local::now(). Remove reserve_adr_number() and its SpacetimeDB POST call. Update schema() display to show timestamp ID with human-readable interpretation.
steps.done_condition: hex adr schema outputs ADR-YYMMDDHHMM format; no SpacetimeDB reservation call; cargo test passes

steps.description: Update Rust CLI list display: widen the ID column in list() from 8 chars to 16 chars to accommodate 10-digit timestamp IDs. Update the ID extraction logic in list() to handle both ADR-NNN and ADR-NNNNNNNNNN patterns.
steps.done_condition: hex adr list displays both legacy 3-digit and new 10-digit IDs without truncation

steps.description: Update TypeScript ADR adapter: modify extractId() regex in src/adapters/secondary/adr-adapter.ts to match both ADR-\d{3} and ADR-\d{10}. Update sort comparator to handle mixed-length numeric IDs correctly (legacy sequential first, then timestamp-ordered).
steps.done_condition: parseADRMarkdown correctly parses timestamp-ID ADRs; sort places legacy before timestamp; bun test passes

steps.description: Update workplan schema: change the ADR field regex in docs/workplan-schema.json from ^ADR-\\d+ to ^ADR-\\d{3,10} to explicitly accept both legacy and timestamp formats.
steps.done_condition: Workplan schema validates both ADR-066 and ADR-2603221500 format references

steps.description: Update TEMPLATE.md: replace {NNN} placeholder with {YYMMDDHHMM} and add a comment explaining the format. Update the /hex-adr-create skill to generate timestamp-based filenames.
steps.done_condition: TEMPLATE.md shows YYMMDDHHMM format; /hex-adr-create skill generates correct filenames

steps.description: Update Rust CLI tests: add test cases for timestamp ID parsing (parse_status, extract_title with 10-digit IDs). Add test for find_next_adr_number generating YYMMDDHHMM. Run cargo test -p hex-cli.
steps.done_condition: All existing tests pass; new tests verify timestamp ID generation and parsing
